narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: "Will it be Kyiv? Yes, it probably should be Kyiv. If not now, then after some time, maybe in some other phase of the development of this conflict."
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This quote directly predicts and makes assumptions about the potential future results of the conflict, specifically the capture of the Ukrainian capital.
